articles.title: James sets NBA appearance record in late Lakers win
articles.original_title: James sets NBA appearance record in late Lakers win
articles.summary: LeBron James sets the record for the most regular-season games played in NBA history as he helps the Los Angeles Lakers to a dramatic buzzer-beating 105-104 victory against the Orlando Magic in his 1,612th outing.

articles.title: Sources: Lakers appeal tech with Luka facing ban
articles.original_title: Sources: Lakers appeal tech with Luka facing ban
articles.summary: Luka Doncic faces a one-game suspension after a verbal exchange with Orlando's Goga Bitadze earned him his 16th technical foul of the season Saturday night. Sources told ESPN the Lakers have already filed an appeal.

articles.title: Kennard steals show, wins it for red-hot Lakers
articles.original_title: Kennard steals show, wins it for red-hot Lakers
articles.summary: Luke Kennard drained a go-ahead 3-pointer with 0.6 seconds left for the Lakers, who won their ninth straight on a night LeBron James made history with his record-breaking 1,612th regular-season game.
